skill.name: brand-guidelines
skill.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatting, or company design standards apply.
skill.summary: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to artifacts for consistent visual identity.
skill.author: ZhanlinCui

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings are false positives. The detected 'external_commands' patterns are markdown inline code formatting for hex color codes (e.g., `#141413`), not shell execution. The 'blocker' and 'reconnaissance' flags incorrectly matched on color definitions and font references. This skill contains only documentation with no executable code, network calls, or filesystem operations.

content.user_title: Apply Anthropic brand colors and typography
content.value_statement: Maintain consistent visual identity across all AI-generated content. This skill applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography automatically.
actual_capabilities: Apply Anthropic's official color palette including dark (#141413), light (#faf9f5), and accent colors
Use correct typography with Poppins for headings and Lora for body text
Provide automatic font fallbacks to Arial and Georgia when custom fonts are unavailable
Style shapes and visual elements with brand-compliant accent colors
Maintain text hierarchy and formatting consistency
Reference precise RGB color values for accurate brand matching
limitations: Requires Poppins and Lora fonts to be pre-installed for optimal results
Only applies to content that supports inline styling or CSS
Does not modify existing brand assets or logos
Limited to Anthropic brand guidelines only

use_cases.title: Marketing Content Creation
use_cases.description: Apply consistent Anthropic branding to presentation slides, documents, and marketing materials generated by AI.

use_cases.title: Internal Documentation
use_cases.description: Ensure all internal docs, guides, and artifacts follow Anthropic visual identity standards.

use_cases.title: Client-Facing Deliverables
use_cases.description: Maintain professional brand consistency in reports, proposals, and presentations shared with external stakeholders.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Brand Color Reference
prompt_templates.prompt: What are Anthropic's official brand colors? Provide the hex codes and usage guidance.

prompt_templates.title: Typography Application
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply Anthropic brand typography to this document. Use the correct fonts for headings and body text.

prompt_templates.title: Complete Brand Styling
prompt_templates.prompt: Style this presentation slide using Anthropic brand guidelines. Apply the correct colors, fonts, and accent styling.

prompt_templates.title: Brand-Compliant Visual Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a visually formatted artifact using Anthropic's complete brand identity. Include proper color scheme, typography hierarchy, and accent colors for visual elements.

output_examples.input: Style this heading with Anthropic brand guidelines
output_examples.output: Heading styled with Poppins font (or Arial fallback), dark color #141413, proper hierarchy maintained

output_examples.input: What accent color should I use for this chart?
output_examples.output: Use Orange (#d97757) for primary data series, Blue (#6a9bcc) for secondary, Green (#788c5d) for tertiary

best_practices: Pre-install Poppins and Lora fonts for optimal rendering across all systems
Use dark color (#141413) for primary text and light color (#faf9f5) for backgrounds
Apply accent colors sparingly to maintain visual hierarchy and brand consistency
anti_patterns: Do not substitute brand colors with similar shades - use exact hex values
Avoid using accent colors for body text - reserve for highlights and visual elements
Do not mix Anthropic brand colors with conflicting color palettes

faq.question: What fonts does this skill use?
faq.answer: Poppins for headings (24pt+) with Arial fallback, and Lora for body text with Georgia fallback.

faq.question: Do I need to install any fonts?
faq.answer: For best results, pre-install Poppins and Lora. The skill automatically falls back to Arial and Georgia if unavailable.

faq.question: What are Anthropic's accent colors?
faq.answer: Orange (#d97757) as primary accent, Blue (#6a9bcc) as secondary, and Green (#788c5d) as tertiary.

faq.question: Can I use this for non-Anthropic projects?
faq.answer: This skill is specifically designed for Anthropic brand compliance. Other brands should use their own guidelines.

faq.question: Does this work with PowerPoint files?
faq.answer: Yes, colors are applied using RGB values compatible with python-pptx and other presentation tools.

faq.question: What is the main background color?
faq.answer: Light (#faf9f5) for light backgrounds and text on dark, with Light Gray (#e8e6dc) for subtle backgrounds.
